Class Tools

java.lang.Object
VM.Tools
public final class Tools extends Object
Utility class that provides static helper methods for user input, input validation, and common vending machine operations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Scanner
    SCAN
    The scanner used for reading user input in the console.

    Method
    Description

    cleanup()
    Closes the scanner used for reading console input.

    getBillType(int bill)
    Returns the type of the specified denomination based on its index in C.BILLS.

    Prompts the user for a non-negative decimal value.

    Prompts the user for an integer within the specified inclusive range.

  • Field Details

    • SCAN

      public static final Scanner SCAN
      The scanner used for reading user input in the console.

  • Constructor Details

    • Tools

      public Tools()

  • Method Details

    • cleanup

      public static void cleanup()
      Closes the scanner used for reading console input. This method should be called before the program terminates to release system resources.

    • rangeInput

      public static int rangeInput(int min, int max)
      Prompts the user for an integer within the specified inclusive range. The method continues prompting until a valid integer within the range is entered.
      Parameters:
      min - the minimum accepted value (inclusive)
      max - the maximum accepted value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      a valid integer between MIN and MAX, inclusive

    • nonNegDouble

      public static double nonNegDouble()
      Prompts the user for a non-negative decimal value. The method continues prompting until a valid non-negative double is entered.
      Returns:
      a valid non-negative double

    • nonNegInt

      public static int nonNegInt()
      Prompts the user for a non-negative integer. The method continues prompting until a valid non-negative integer is entered.
      Returns:
      a valid non-negative integer

    • getBillType

      public static String getBillType(int bill)
      Returns the type of the specified denomination based on its index in C.BILLS.
      Parameters:
      bill - the index of the denomination
      Returns:
      the denomination type (" note", " coin", or " centavo")

    • sumBills

      public static double sumBills(ArrayList<Integer> bills)
      Calculates the total value of the specified denominations and displays each denomination and its corresponding type.
      Parameters:
      bills - the list of denomination indices
      Returns:
      the total monetary value of the denominations
